snippet.title: POGARU (2021) NEW Released Full Hindi Dubbed Movie | Dhruva Sarja, Rashmika Mandanna, Kai Greene
snippet.description:
Dhruva Sarja is unstoppable in his path as he has garnered the support and affection of the general public by fighting against the injustice that comes their way. However, one incident that occurs in his childhood, changes his life forever. How exactly he overcomes that incident forms the rest of the story.

Censor Cerification Number - VIL/2/93/2021- MUM
Movie (Hindi Dubbed):- Pogaru
Original Movie Name:- Pogaru (In Kannada)
Starcast: Dhruva Sarja, Rashmika Mandanna, Bullet Prakash, Kai Greene
Producer: B. K. Gangadhar  
Music: V. Harikrishna, Chandan Shetty 
Director: Nanda Kishore

snippet.title: लाहुरेको गाउँको कथा । Lahureko Gaunko Katha - Herne Katha EP55 । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
गाउँछेउ आजकल वनकुसुमहरु फुल्दैनन् । पैंयुका बोटमा अडेस लागेर बाख्रा चराउने केटाकेटीहरु भेटिँदैनन् । धान फल्ने खेतहरु वनमाराका झाडी भएका छन् । ढुँगाका छपनीहरु लेउले ढाकेका छन् । पँधेरामा पानी रसाउन छाडेको छ । बरु रसाइरहन्छ भक्तबहादुरको आँखा । रोइरहन्छ मन । 
#HerneKatha #LahurekoGaun

Story of a abandoned village near Pokhara in Western Nepal.



Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


🚀🚀🚀 Herne  Katha Team 🚀🚀🚀

🎬 Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

localized.title: लाहुरेको गाउँको कथा । Lahureko Gaunko Katha - Herne Katha EP55 । हेर्ने कथा
localized.description:
गाउँछेउ आजकल वनकुसुमहरु फुल्दैनन् । पैंयुका बोटमा अडेस लागेर बाख्रा चराउने केटाकेटीहरु भेटिँदैनन् । धान फल्ने खेतहरु वनमाराका झाडी भएका छन् । ढुँगाका छपनीहरु लेउले ढाकेका छन् । पँधेरामा पानी रसाउन छाडेको छ । बरु रसाइरहन्छ भक्तबहादुरको आँखा । रोइरहन्छ मन । 
#HerneKatha #LahurekoGaun

Story of a abandoned village near Pokhara in Western Nepal.



Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️

Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-700 || April-27-2021|| हैसियत बाईकको || By Media Hub
snippet.description:
In today's episode, Ghiraule makes a big purchase and becomes the talk of the whole village. How will this event affect everyone? Watch to find out

Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

शिशिर भण्डारी

Story/ Direction
Shishir Bhandari

Copyright
© Shishir Bhandari Entertainment 2021

Lyrics-
छोडी जाने मायालाई बिर्सुं कसरी ।
झल्को आउंदा यो मुटुमा दुख्छ बेसरी । 
तिम्रै यादमा तड्पी तड्पी बांचिराख्या छु ।
छुट्ने बेला देको रुमाल साची राख्या छु ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
यो पापी सँसारबाट बिदा लिनु छ..2
जिन्दगी नै तिमो नाम गरिदिनु छ ।

तिम्ले अर्कै रोजे पनि मैले रोज्दिंन ।
तिम्रो बारे नराम्रो कहिले सोच्दिन ।।
मैले भन्दा धेरै माया उस्ले गरोस है ।
मेरो भागको सबै खुशी तिम्लाई परोस है ।।
कांडा हैन फुलै फुल होस तिम्रो बाटोमा ।
रुनै परे मै रुला नि तिम्रो साटोमा ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
यो पापी सँसारबाट बिदा लिनु छ..2
जिन्दगी नै तिमो नाम गरिदिनु छ ।

कहिले रुवाउँछ मायाले कहिले हासाउँछ ।
टाढा हुँदा आँखाबाट आँशु रसाउँछ  ।।
दुई मुटुको साँचो कथा बोल्छ मायाले ।
आगोले झैं भतभती पोल्छ मायाले ।।
मिलन बिछोड पिरतीको गीतै रै'छ नि ।
पाउनु र गुमाउनु त रितै रै'छ नि ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
यो पापी सँसारबाट बिदा लिनु छ..2
जिन्दगी नै तिमो नाम गरिदिनु छ ।

थाहा छैन कहां छौं, के गर्दै होलाउ ?
बिर्सियौ कि मायाले सम्झिदै रोलाउ ?
एकै झल्को देख्दा नि यो मन मान्थ्यो कि ।
भेटे तिम्लाई हुरुक्कै परान जान्थ्यो कि ।
छैन मलाई गुनासो तिम्रो घातैको ।
मर्नी बेलां पानी पाऊं तिम्रो हातैको ।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
यो पापी सँसारबाट बिदा लिनु छ..2
जिन्दगी नै तिमो नाम गरिदिनु छ ।

यस च्यानलमा  अपलोड भएका हरेक अन्तबार्ता, रिपोर्ट  तथा  अन्य Video हरु कपि, Download गरी अन्य Channel मा upload गरेको पाइएमा प्रचालित कानुन बमोजिम कडा भन्दा कडा कारबाही गरिनेछ । 
Using of this video on other channels without prior permission will be strictly prohibited. (Embedding to the websites is allowed)

snippet.description:
Host:Ganga lama
Edit/Camera: Man Ghising
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ साथै विभिन्न कलाकारहरु संगको रोचक सम्बाद हेर्नको लागि कृपया हाम्रो च्यानल GOOD TV लाइ SUBSCRIBE गर्न नभुल्नु होला धन्यबाद !!!
Note- के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर 9849148126 मा सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौl  
यस च्यानलमा रहेका Video हरु कपि, Download गरी अन्य Channel मा upload गरेको पाएमा प्रचलित कानुन बमोजिम कडा भन्दा कडा कारबाही गरिनेछ ।
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ। 
#भिडियो_अन्तिम_सम्म_हेरि_सेयर_गर्नुहोला ।

snippet.title: Shrinkhala Khatiwada हेटौंडादेखि हार्वर्डसम्मको कहानी | TAMASOMA JYOTIRGAMAYA | AP1HD
snippet.description:
Tamasoma Jyotirgamaya is one of the most popular television talk shows in the nation. As the name suggests it is an effort to explore the true knowledge on the national and international affairs that matter to the communities and the human race as a whole. The guests of the shows include top political leaderships and renowned figures from different walks of life, mostly associated with the contested affairs. The host of the show is Mr. Tikaram Yatri, the editor-in-chief of AP1HD Television. The broadcast time of the show is Monday (9 to 10 PM).

एपीवानबाट प्रत्येक सोमबार बेलुका ९ बजे प्रसारण हुने तमसो मा ज्योतिर्गमय सकारात्मक सोच,सम्भावना र उज्यालोको खोजी गर्ने बहुचर्चित टेलिभिजन अन्तर्वार्ता हो । जीवन भोगाइका बहुआयामिक रंगको इन्द्रेणी यस कार्य्रक्रममा जुनसुकै क्षेत्रका विज्ञ विष्लेषक तथा उदाहरणीय पात्रलाई अतिथिका रूपमा निम्त्याउने गरिन्छ । राष्ट्रियता र स्वाभिमानको पक्षमा कुनै सम्झौता नगरी विकास र परिवर्तनको पक्षमा आवाज मुखरित गर्नु यस कार्यक्रमको मुख्य उद्देश्य हो ।

Presenter: Tikaram Yatri
Guest: Shrinkhala Khatiwada

Researcher: Saroj Gautam
Producer:  Phurba Sherpa
Program Co-Ordinator : Kamala Subedi
Social Media Executive: Krishna Karki

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15’ to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

snippet.title: महाराष्ट्र के बीड में कोरोना का प्रकोप, एक साथ जलाई गई 22 चिता
snippet.description:
महाराष्ट्र के बीड में कोरोना का प्रकोप, एक साथ जलाई गई 22 चिता

News State (न्यूज स्टेट) उत्तर भारत का सबसे विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. यहां पर क्षेत्र की सभी जरूरी खबरों को वरीयता से दर्शकों तक पहुंचाता है. यहां पर राज्य की राजनीति ही नहीं देशभर में क्या हो रहा है, इसके बारे में भी भरपूर खबरों का खजाना है. इसके अलावा क्राइम, बिजनेस, खेल और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें भी दर्शकों को परोसे जाते हैं. News State UP-UK खास तौर पर उत्तर प्रदेश और उत्तराखंड के लोगों की खबरों की जरूरतों का ध्यान रखता है.  वहीं, News State MP-CG विशेष रूप से मध्य प्रदेश और छत्तीसगढ़ के दर्शकों का ख्याल रखता है. सबसे निष्पक्ष, विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों को सबसे पहले पाने के लिए बने रहें हमारे साथ.

News State is a 24-hour Hindi news channel that caters in addition to National coverage, regional coverages too. We have regional channels like News State Uttar Pradesh/Uttarakhand and News State Madhya Pradesh/Chattisgarh. In terms of TRP News State UP/UK is number one channel in the northern India region. No other channel is in competition with our channel. It is because we give trustworthy and quick news. News State is a preferred channel by an audience which favors high quality programming and news.

Only Channel in the region that caters for the regional demand in such a way that it has become favourite channel of the audience.

चैनल सब्सक्राइब करें: 
https://www.youtube.com/NewsStateTV
हमारे फेसबुक पेज को लाइक करें: 
https://www.facebook.com/NewsState/
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें: https://twitter.com/NewsStateHindi
News State Apps डाउनलोड करें: 
Download Android and iOS Apps for more updates: 
Android App: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.newsnation.newsstate
iOS App: 
https://apps.apple.com/in/app/news-state/id1224659680
अन्य वीडियो देखें : https://www.newsstate.com/videos

snippet.title: Wafa Na Raas Aayee Song Jubin Nautiyal Ft.Himansh K,Arushi N, Meet Bros|Rashmi V|Ashish P| Bhushan K
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Wafa Na Raas Aayee" in the voice of Jubin Nautiyal, music by Meet Bros, lyrics are written by Rashmi Virag. The song features Himansh Kohli, Arushi Nishank & Rohit Suchanti. The video is directed by Ashish Panda. 
Hit 'LIKE' if you ♥ this song.

Get ready for #WafaNaRaasAayee to pinch your heart and stir your emotions.

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin

baaz na aayega

snippet.title: Kanpur COVID Condition: Hallet Hospital में Corona मृतक के परिवार का दावा डरा देगा | Covid-19 in UP
snippet.description:
#CoronaInUP #COVID19inUttarPradesh #CoronavirusInIndia #Covid19India #CoronaUpdate During the ground coverage of The Lallantop's Corona Zamini Hakikat, the team of The Lallantop visited Hallet Hospital in Kanpur to know the reality of arrangements and management done by the administration to overcome the Coronavirus pandemic in the city. 
While talking to the family members of corona patients, The Lallantop came across the wife of a deceased man who shared that her husband complained of being beaten by doctors while getting treatment for Covid-19. As of April 27, India's most populous state reported a total of over 11.2 lakh cases, including 33,551 in the last 24 hours. The total death toll has reached 11,414 according to official figures. The Opposition has accused the state government of under-reporting Covid-19 figures and trying to paint a rosy picture.

snippet.title: रबिनले सुमनलाई किन छाडा भने हेर्नुहोस् | Rabin Lamichhane VS Suman Thapa | Sarangi Sansar  Ep. 231
snippet.description:
सुमधुर स्वरका धनी चर्चित तथा लोकप्रिय लोक दोहोरी गायक रबिन लामिछाने र सुमधुर स्वरकी धनी चर्चित लोक दोहोरी गायिका सुमन थापा मगर बिचको रमाईलो दोहोरी  प्रस्तुत गरेका छौँ कृपया यो भिडियो हेरेर लाईक कमन्ट साथै सेयर गरिदिनुहुन बिनम्र अनुरोध गर्दछौँ ।

snippet.title: Covid-19 Delhi News: छुपाया जा रहा है मौत का आकंड़ा?
snippet.description:
Coronavirus News in Delhi: दिल्ली में कोरोना से मौत के आंकड़े सवालों में हैं. NDTV के रियलिटी चेक में नगर निगम ने बताया कि उनके घाटों पर पिछले एक हफ़्ते में 3,096 शवों का अंतिम संस्कार हुआ है. जबकि दिल्ली सरकार ने 1,938 मौतों का ही आंकड़ा दिया है. ऐसे में सवाल उठ रहे हैं कि आख़िर हज़ार से ज़्यादा मौतों का रहस्य क्या है?

About Us: NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment. NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.
 
NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिन्दी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिज़नेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

snippet.title: Coronavirus India Update: कोरोना की दूसरी वेव के बारे में बताते हुए भावुक हो गईं Dr. Trupti Gilada|
snippet.description:
कोरोना (Corona) की दूसरी लहर से देश जूझ रहा है, हेल्थ वॉरियर्स (Health Warriors) भी इस महामारी में पूरी कोशिश कर रहे हैं कि मरीजों को बचाया जा सके. डॉ तृप्ति गिलाडा, एक इन्फेक्शस डिसीज फिजिशियन हैं, उनकी अपील है कि सभी को मास्क जरूर पहनना चाहिए और कोरोना के सभी नियमों का पालन करना चाहिए. 
 
#Mumbai #Coronavirus #India

कोरोना पर भारत के लिए उम्मीद की किरण. समझिए यहां  - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MGWAE4wa9S4

क्विंट हिंदी की स्वतंत्र पत्रकारिता का साथ दीजिए. हमारे मेंबर बनिए: https://bit.ly/2mE6B8P

आपके लिए जरूरी हर खबर क्विंट पर: https://hindi.thequint.com

द क्विंट इंग्लिश में: https://www.thequint.com

आपको बेहतरीन वीडियो मिलेंगे हमारे यू-ट्यूब चैनल पर: https://bit.ly/2x6pGVD
आप क्विंट हिंदी को यहां भी फॉलो कर सकते हैं:

फेसबुक:https://bit.ly/2LJfzLy

ट्विटर: https://bit.ly/2nhoAlL

इंस्टाग्राम:https://bit.ly/2NGHzRK

snippet.title: Coronavirus India update: सरकार पर फटने लगा है लोगों का ग़ुस्सा, Pakistan में भी बढ़ता ख़तरा
snippet.description:
पिछले 24 घंटे में कोरोना संक्रमण के साढ़े 3 लाख से ज़्यादा मामले. कई डॉक्टरों के मुताबिक़- अस्पताल में जगह ना मिलने से सड़कों पर हो रही है लोगों की मौत.बढ़ते संक्रमण के बीच मद्रास हाईकोर्ट की सख़्त टिप्पणी.कोरोना की दूसरी लहर के लिए चुनाव आयोग ज़िम्मेदार. चले हत्या का केस.

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

बीबीसी हिंदी का एंड्रॉयड ऐप डाउनलोड करने के लिए क्लिक करें- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=uk.co.bbc.hindi

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 18 April 2021 at 9:00 PM

Harke Haldar Team :

Artists : Bishnu Sapkota, Shivahari Bairagi (Nepal), Roshani Sapkota, Surendra K.C., Shiva Sharma, Indra Dong Lama, Saru Dahal, Anita Karki, Anju Rawali, Asmita Basnet, Padam Karki, Rajendra Giri, Yadu Dhital

Recording Studio : ManjuShree Studio
Title Vocal : Prakash Ojha 
Music : Basanta Sapkota
Unit Management : Rajendra Giri / Yedunath Dhital

Legal Advisor : Naradmuni Pyakurel

Sport : Ram Saran Tamang

Producer : Indra Dong Lama

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 4 | Plan B Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can’t ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Special Mention: Nilotpal Bora for Dhaaga

UPSC fact #91: Satyendra worked as a clerk in the excise department, his marriage was arranged with Aarti. But Aarti ran away a night before their wedding because she found out that she had cleared the PCS exam. Satyendra who was initially heartbroken worked really hard and became an IAS officer. Eventually, Aarti came back into his life and they got married.
PS: It’s a True Story.
-Description Guy.

snippet.title: Tamil Superstar VIJAY Action Hindi Dubbed Movie | Dum 2 - दम 2 | Jyothika, Vivek
snippet.description: The movie story deals with Thirumalai a mechanic who lives with his friends and parents in Puthupet, Chennai. On the occasion of 2002 New Year's Eve, he meets Swetha and falls in love with her. But due to her arrogant behavior, Thirumalai is beat up by her goons. After realizing his good nature, she reciprocates his feelings. This is opposed by her father Ashok, who calls a thug named Arasu, who has a reputation of being a big mafia crime boss in Chennai. Hence, Thirumalai fights with them and this makes Arasu realize all of his misbehavior. In the end, Arasu changes his mind about the match, and Ashok also realizes his mistakes. He accepts their love finally, and both reunite with each other.

snippet.title: बड़ा , मद्धम या छोटा फूड चैलेंज | क्रेजी मुक्कबंग बड़ा और छोटा खाना रटाटा द्वारा
snippet.description:
चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें RATATA Hindi: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCk9nbUmM7sXRIJyPyU9gyUQ?sub_confirmation=1
गोल्ड खाना या  सिल्वर खाना  चैलेंज: https://youtu.be/h5mfjAXMMcA

हमारे पास आपके लिए एक नई चुनौती है! क्या आपने बड़े, मध्यम और छोटे केक या बर्गर खाने की कोशिश की है? में जानना चाहता हु कि बाकी की तुलना में तेजी से सभी भोजन कौन खा सकता है? जवाब उतना आसान नहीं है जितना लगता है! खुश देखने! इस स्वादिष्ट वीडियो को लाइक करना ना भूलें और इस तरह के और वीडियो देखने के लिए हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें!
इस वीडियो को अपने दोस्तों के साथ शेयर करें और रटाटा चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें!

snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

snippet.title: India overwhelmed by world’s worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: IF SWEET FOOD WERE PEOPLE! Relatable Situations With Candy And Other Food by Crafty Panda
snippet.description:
Hey there, foodie Pandas! Have you ever wondered what our food thinks and how it feels? Fizzy drinks damaging your teeth? Not a problem, we have Miss Chewing Gum to kick the bad guys out of your mouth! How does a french fry feel being dipped in ketchup? Or a steak being massaged? Let’s keep watching and find out! Don’t forget to stay tuned for more awkward moments & relatable situations by Crafty Panda!

If you enjoyed this video, you might also like “RICH VS POOR WAYS TO SNEAK FOOD ANYWHERE! Clever & Funny Ways to Sneak Snacks by Crafty Panda”: https://youtu.be/T3NZLBivdcM

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Katai Uslai (Samaya)
snippet.description:
Bipul Chettri - Vocals, Acoustic Guitar, Harmonica

Written, composed and arranged by Bipul Chettri.
Recorded, mixed and mastered by Anindo Bose at Plug 'N' Play Studios.
Cover artwork and design by Manohar Rai.

Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

Note: You can purchase the song at this brand new platform for independent Nepali music.
https://noodlerex.com.np/songs/350/

This is a message that the listener is being asked to carry to a lover left behind in the past. From the very first lines, one senses the sender’s yearning for closure, forgiveness and absolution. A more perceptive ear will pick up the desperation of a man who wishes he could go back in time and set things right, for he has just realised that there can be no one else quite like her. But, it is the resignation with which the words are sung that reveal that he is aware that this is but just a fantasy. While the past maybe be exactly where he left it, everything and everyone else have moved on. Performed with the typical precipitous western classical-styled finger-picking that Bipul has now come to be associated with, the bittersweet song comes to an end with the wail of a Dylanesque harmonica solo.

(Liner Notes by Nima D.T. Namchu)

All Rights Reserved by Bipul Chettri. 2021.

snippet.title: Coronavirus India Update : India में कोरोना के हालात पर Pakistan के PM Imran Khan क्या बोले?
snippet.description:
भारत में फैले कोरोना वायरस पर पाकिस्तानी प्रधानमंत्री इमरान ख़ान ने टिप्पणी की है. उन्होंने अपने देश को चेताया कि अगर वो ना संभले तो भारत जैसे हालात बन जाएंगे. इमरान ख़ान ने ईद तक कोरोना के नियमों का कड़ाई से पालन करने की गुज़ारिश की.

#CoronaVirus #CoronaIndia #Pakistan 

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

बीबीसी हिंदी का एंड्रॉयड ऐप डाउनलोड करने के लिए क्लिक करें- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=uk.co.bbc.hindi

snippet.title: Comedy Champion Season 2 - TOP 10 Episode 14
snippet.description:
Comedy Champion Season 2 - TOP 10 Episode 14
Special Guest: Jitu Nepal

a super successful Season 1, we are back to sweep you off your feet and make your stomachs ache. Comedy Champion Season 2! 

The judges for the show are Legendary Artist Santosh Pant, Popular Stand-Up Comedian Manoj Gajurel, Celebrated Director Pradip Bhattarai, and Talented Actress Reecha Sharma hosted by Prominent VJ Rima Bishwokarma.  

It’s a Three Production Presentation. 

Watch Full Episodes of Comedy Champion Season 2 only on Kantipur TV and OSR Reality.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-699 || April-20-2021|| By Media Hub Official Channel
snippet.description:
Basmati is on a mission to transform the village. Kailo and Chulthey are up to mischief. How will everyone else react to what's going on? Watch all this and more in today's episode

Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta
Sub-Editor: Ashok Chaudhary
Graphics: Rajendra Manandhar
Script Writer: Kunjan Bhattarai
Camera: Rahul Rai
Makeup: Nirmala Acharya
Title song Writer: Shankar Adhikari 
Music/Singer: Chetan Sapkota 
Artists: Laxmi Giri, Surbir Pandit, Ramchandra Adhikari, Daman Rupakheti,  Surendra K.C, Palpasa Dangol, Suraj Chapagain, Januka Poudel, Niru Khadka, Tika bhakta Jirel, Ratna Prajapati, Lekhant Bhusal(Lekharaj), Diwakar Bhandari, Madhu Acharya, Krishna Joshi, Dhanaram Muskan, Sarswoti Fuyal, Dharma Prasad Bhattarai and many more.

snippet.title: लाल  तीखा  या नीला मीठा  फूड चैलेंज | क्रेजी ईटिंग मीठी और तीखी नूडल्स! मुकबंग रटाटा द्वारा
snippet.description:
चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें RATATA Hindi: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCk9nbUmM7sXRIJyPyU9gyUQ?sub_confirmation=1
कोई हाथ नहीं या एक हाथ या दो हाथ से खाने का चैलेंज! क्रेजी फनी खाने के तरीके रटाटा द्वारा: https://youtu.be/nlFRvXm85E0

खैर, स्वादिष्ट खाना  के प्रेमियों, चलो एक नई खाने  की चुनौती करते  है? हाँ, हाँ, हम जानते हैं कि आप इसे बहुत पसंद करते हैं! आप क्या कहंगे  अगर हम केवल एक ही रंग के मीठे और मसालेदार खाना  खाये ? क्या हम केवल नीले मीठे और लाल मसालेदार खाना  पर 24 घंटे जीवित रह सकते हैं? तो, चलो इस क्रेजी चुनौती को जल्द से जल्द शुरू करें और हमारी ताकत की परीक्षा  लेते  है ! सबसे शक्तिशाली  की जीत होगी ! इस वीडियो को लाइक करें, हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें और इस तरह की और भी रोचक सामग्री देखें! देखने का आंनद उठाये !

इस वीडियो को अपने दोस्तों के साथ शेयर करें और रटाटा चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें!

snippet.title: Viral Video: Mayur Shelke, जिन्होंने Railway Track पर गिरे Blind Mother के Child को बचाया। Bravery
snippet.description:
Viral Video: Mayur Shelke, जिन्होंने Railway Track पर गिरे Blind Mother के Child को बचाया। Bravery

तालियों की गड़गड़ाहट के बीच कृतज्ञता से हाथ जोड़कर खड़े इस शख्स को शायद नहीं पहचानते होंगे आप, पर हो सकता है कि आपने सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल एक  वीडियो जरूर देखा होगा, जिसमें एक नेत्रहीन मां का 6 साल का बच्चा प्लेटफॉर्म पर चलते हुए गलती से ट्रैक पर गिर जाता है। बच्चे की मां आंखें ना होने की वजह से समझ ही नहीं पाती कि हुआ क्या है। वो यहां वहां हाथ मारकर बच्चे को तलाशने लगती है। चिल्लाने लगती है। बच्चा ट्रैक से ऊपर प्लैटफॉर्म पर चढ़ने की कोशिश करता है, लेकिन  इस बीच ट्रेन आ जाती है। बस कुछ सेकेंड्स का फासला था, मौत नजदीक आ रही थी...और तभी एंट्री होती है कहानी के हीरो की। जी हां, यही हैं हमारे असली हीरो। नाम- मयूर  शेलके। मयूर ने चीते की रफ्तार से सिर्फ 7 सेकेंड के अंदर बच्चे को प्लैटफॉर्म पर चढ़ाया और खुद भी ऊपर आ गए। एक बार फिर देखिए कि मौत कितनी नजदीक थी।  लेकिन मयूर ने वो ऐसा साहस, ऐसी दिलेरी दिखाई जो सिर्फ फिल्मी कहानियों में देखने को मिलती है। वीडियो को ध्यान से देखने पर ये भी पता चलता  है कि एक सेंकेंड के लिए मयूर को भी तेजी से आती ट्रेन को देखकर ये शक हुआ कि क्या वाकई वो बच्चे को बचा पाएगा? लेकिन अगले ही सेकेंड उसने तय कर लिया कि बच्चे  को तो बचाना ही है। हीरो ऐसे ही होते हैं, मुसीबत के वक्त जल्द फैसला लेने वाले, दूसरों के लिए अपनी जान को जोखिम में डालने वाले। ये घटना मुंबई के नजदीक वंगणी रेलवे  स्टेशन की है और ये वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर छाया हुआ है। मयूर रेलवे में पाइंट्समैन के रूप में काम करते हैं, जो फील्ड वर्कर होते हैं। उनका काम ये देखना होता है कि ट्रेन सिग्नल सही तरीके से काम कर रहा है या नहीं। मयूर के साहस को आज पूरी दुनिया सलाम कर रही है। रेलवे के अफसरों ने खास तौर पर सम्मानित किया। अफसरों ने भी कहा कि मयूर ने जो किया वैसी मिसाल कम ही देखने को मिलती हैं।

#MayurShelke #VanganiRailwayStation #NBT

snippet.title: लेटेस्ट नई रिलीज़ मूवी " रक्षक "हिंदी डब में |नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में | सौंदर्या, ब्रह्मानंदम
snippet.description:
Movie Title: Main Hoon Rakshak (Taraka Ramudu) - South Dubbed Hindi Movies 2014 Full Movie
Genre: Hindi Action Drama Movie
Starcast: Srikant, Saundarya, Brahmanandam
Director: RV Uday Kumar
Ramu (Srikanth) Ek sidha sadha ladka hain. Use padhnaa likhna nahi aata. Wo gaon me akela rehta hain aur logo ke kamo me help karta rehta hain. Usi gaon me me Simran (Soundarya) Officer ban ke aati hain. Wo bahot imandar officer hain. Aur gaon me kisike ghar me rent se rehti hain.

Rangnath jise gaav ke log Bade sahib ke naam se jaante hain wo gaav ke mukhiya hain. Aur unka saala Naidu jiske naam se gaon ke log darte hain wo gaon ke kaamo me lagne wala paisa khata hain. Aur logo pe julm karte rehta hain.

Ramu Aur Simran ki mulakat ek bus me hoti hain. Usi bas me kuchh gunde simaran ko pareshan karte hain. Ramu unn gunde ko maarta hain aur dono me pehchan ho jati hain.

Simran Naidu ke kaamo ka pardafash karne me lag jati hain aur uska jeena mushkil kar deti hain. Naidu Simaran ka ghar khali karva deta hain aur Ramu Simaran ko help karke uske ghar me rehne lagte hain.

Simran gaon ke kaam imandari se karna chahti hain par Naidu use pareshan karte rehta hain. Ek din Simaran Naidu ke kuchh logo ko arrest karvati hain. Phir wahi log simaran ke sath jabardasti karte hain aur Ramu unn logo ko markar Simran ko bachata hain.

Ek Din Simaran ki maa use milane aa jati hain aur Ramu ke bare me use pata chal jata hain ki wo Rangnath ka beta hain. Rangnath ko baat pata chal jati hain aur wo bahot khush ho jata hain Aur Ramu Ko prince bana deta hain par Naidu use kisi tareeke se maarna chahta hain par Ramu bachh jata hain.

Ramu, Naidu aur usake aadmiyo ke beech ladai hoti hai aur burai pe achchai ki jeet hoti hai.

snippet.description:
नेपाल  र भारतको पूर्वी सिमानामा डाँडाँकाँडा छिचोल्दै बग्छ  मेची नदी । मेची नदीकाे घुमाउराे लहरो पछ्याउँदै सिमानाका मान्छेहरु आउजाउ गर्छन् । इलामको सिमान्त गाउँका मान्छेहरु घोडा खच्चड  लिएर सौदा गर्न भारतको नक्सलबारी हाट झर्दा रहेछन् । हाटबाट  फर्किरहेका घोडचढीहरुलाई  हामीले मेची बगरमा भेट्यौं । र उनीहरुसँगै किनारै किनार उकालो लाग्यौं । 

#HerneKatha #SimantaKatha

Stories of people and villages in the mountains of Eastern Nepal bordering India.


Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


🚀🚀🚀 Herne  Katha Team 🚀🚀🚀

🎬 Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

🖥 Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

🎮 Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

📝 Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

👍🏼 Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

✉️ Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

🚍 Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com
👉 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: आफ्नै साथी बुटवलमा मारेर रातारात बागलुङ लगेर गा'डे, घ टनास्थल मै पुग्दा यस्तो भेटियो  | Exclusive
snippet.description:
आफ्नै साथी बुटवलमा मारेर रातारात बागलुङ लगेर गा'डे, घ टनास्थल मै पुग्दा यस्तो भेटियो ,  बागलुङ सुट्केश काण्ड । ११ लाख काे लागि साथीकै ह त्या ।

Host : Resham Bohora
Camera : Bishnu Gurung
Editing : Resham Bohora

snippet.title: Sunil Giri - Lekali Bhegaima (लेकाली भेगैमा) • Urmila Gurung • Official MV • 2078
snippet.description:
Presenting new track Lekali Bhegaima (लेकाली भेगैमा) penned by Loman Kumar Sunar. composed and sung by myself. Beautiful Urmila Gurung has been featured in this Music Video.

बिशेष आभार 
महाबु गाउँ पालिका दैलेखका अध्यक्ष, जंग बहादुर शाही 
उधोग बाणिज्य संघ दैलेखका अध्यक्ष,  भैरहवा सुन चाँदी पसलका प्रो कुल बहादुर बिक 
उत्तम निर्माण सेवा, दैलेख- अशाेक कुमार थापा
कटक बुढा
राजेश कुमार बुढा 
सन्तोष कुमार बुढा 
रमेश कुमार बुढा 

Audio Credits
Lekali Bhegaima (लेकाली भेगैमा)
Vocal/Compose/Arrangement/Mix/Master: Sunil Giri
Lyrics: Loman Kumar Sunar (Pratibaddha)
Flute: Ratna BK
Guitar: Saroj 
Madal: Posan Gharti 
Makeup: Sakshyam Pudasaini
Casts: Urmila Gurung, Sunil Giri, Bishnu Kumar BC, Loman Kumar Sunar (Pratibaddha)
Camera Asstistant: Binod Shrestha
Camera Works: Jitu Tamang
Visual Edit: Manoj Karki
Colorist: Rajendra Moktan
Direction: Sunil Giri
Digital Content & Distribution Management: Pawan Simkhada
Post Production: Luminious Postworks 

Thankful to

Bishal Kumar Sunar

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Ultaa Paailaa [Official Lyrical Video Release]
snippet.description:
Official lyrical video for Sajjan Raj Vaidya's 'Ultaa Paailaa'.

'Ultaa Paailaa' is a story of circumstance. It is a moment of realization of the inevitable end of love you are forced to step away from. With it, you forever carry the weight of acceptance of what could have been but did not. A unity created and separated by time.

Written | Performed | Produced by:
Sajjan Raj Vaidya

Artwork by: Kailash Subedi (@kailashs)

The Downtown Flux team for 'Ultaa Paailaa':
Kailash Subedi
Nurbu Lama
Sajjan Raj Vaidya

Sharif Shrestha

snippet.title: Nepali Serial Juthe (जुठे) Episode 6 || April 21-2021 By Raju Poudel Marichman Shrestha
snippet.description:
Master TV Presents:-
Juthe is a social television serial that portrays a story about the Dalits emancipation movement against these oppression, the heroes of the movement and future vision for the emancipation. It is aired in Himalaya Television at 8:00 PM and in YouTube at 9:00 PM every Wednesday.

भरतमणि पौडेल यतिबेला कमेडी च्याम्पियनमा दर्शकका रोजाइका कलाकार बनेका छन् । सानैदेखि जानेर वा नजानेर गाउँकै मानिसहरूको नक्कल गर्न थाले भरतमणि पौडेलले । कला क्षेत्रका लागि उनले आफ्ना धेरै कुराहरू छोडिदिएका छन् । यतिबेला भने उनी नेपाली हाँस्य कलाकारितामा चर्चाको शिखरमा छन् ।

Bharatmani Poudel is currently the comedy champion of the audience's choice. From an early age, Bharatmani Poudel started imitating the people of the village, knowingly or unknowingly. He has given up a lot of things for the arts. At this time, he is at the peak of discussion in Nepali comedy.

snippet.title: Breaking | वैशाख १६ गतेदेखि काठमाडौं बन्द , कोरोनाले तहल्कै मच्चायो ! उपत्यका छोड्न २ दिन समय
snippet.description:
Host : Laxman Gajurel 
Camera/Edit : Nabarj Giri 

काठमाडौं उपत्यकाका ३ जिल्लामा निषेधाज्ञा लाग्ने भएको छ ।सोमबार काठमाडौं, भक्तपुर र ललितपुर जिल्लाका प्रमुख जिल्ला अधिकारीको बैठकले अत्यावश्यकबाहेकका सेवा बन्द गर्ने, खाद्यपदार्थ र औषधी पसलबाहेकका अरु पसल बन्द गर्ने निर्णय गरेको स्रोतले बताए।  वैशाख १६ गतेदेखि सार्वजनिक र निजी यातायात पनि बन्द गर्ने स्रोतको भनाइ छ । होटल तथा रेष्टुरेन्टले पनि टेक अवे सेवा मात्र दिन पाउनेछन् ।




के तपाईले हाम्रो च्यानललाई SUBSCRIBE गर्नु भयो ? गर्नु भएको छैन भने यस्तै रमाईलो र सन्देशमुलक भिडियो हेर्नका लागि आजै हाम्रो युटुब च्यानल SUBSCRIBE गर्नुहोस । यो भिडियो तपाईलाई मन परेको छ भने लाईक, सेयर र कमेन्ट गर्नुहोस् । Note- यदि तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला र प्रतिभा छ वा तपाईको नजिक कोहि त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान व्यक्ति हुनुहुन्छ भने हामीलाई सम्पर्क गर्नुहोस् मोबाईल नम्बर- :-9813398186 वा फेसबुक अकाउण्ट https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100008147947906 मा क्लिक गरी म्यासेज छोड्नुहोला ।

snippet.title: Strange Riddle Behind The Little One | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

An Incident of a little one has created an enigma around CID Team. While searching for the family members, they relate the story with problematic twists and turns. Who is this child? Where did she come from? What is the mystery of her family? Will Team CID be able to solve this case and find the Puzzle? Watch now, To know more.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: WOW! Arthur Gunn Puts Incredible Spin On Goo Goo Dolls’ “Iris”! - American Idol 2021
snippet.description:
Arthur Gunn has gone his own way since we were first introduced to him on season 3 of American Idol back in 2020, so he wasn’t about to stop now! Putting his own, incredible spin on the Goo Goo Dolls’ “Iris,” Arthur gives us WOW after WOW with this performance. Will Arthur WOW America into voting him into this season’s Top 10?!

See more of American Idol 2021 on our official site: http://www.americanidol.com
Like American Idol on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AmericanIdol
Follow American Idol on Twitter: https://twitter.com/americanidol
Follow American Idol on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/americanidol/

AMERICAN IDOL, the iconic series that revolutionized the television landscape by pioneering the music competition genre, returns on ABC.

American Idol 2021

Helping to determine who America will ultimately vote for to become the next singing sensation are music industry forces and superstar judges Luke Bryan, Katy Perry and Lionel Richie. Emmy® Award-winning host and producer Ryan Seacrest continues as host of the beloved series, while multimedia personality Bobby Bones serves as the in-house mentor.

snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

localized.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
localized.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

snippet.title: MADHANYA - Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar | Asees Kaur |Lijo-DJ Chetas| Anshul Garg | Wedding Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Madhanya by Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur featuring Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar. 


Singer: Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur
Music: Lijo George & Dj Chetas
Lyrics: Kumaar
Song Produced by Lijo George
Mixed and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Assistant engineer: Pukhraj
Vocals recorded at Soundideaz & Click Studios
Recording Engineers : Kittu & Rupak
Featuring: Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Co - Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Choreographer - Sahil Sharma 
Assistant Choreographer - Rajat 
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
Styled by - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Jib operator - Manish Arora
Line producer  - RS films and production 
Makeup - Rajan Passi
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Madhanya Lyrics : 

Beetein saare mausam
Babul tere ghar mein
Ab chale pav mere
Piya ke shehar mein (2)

Ho Tune Vidayiyan kaise
Likhi Marjaaniyan
Kaise bataye O Rabba
Sahi naiyon jaaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye o mere babula teriyan
Mithiyan yaadan
Mere peeche peeche auniyan haaye
Haaye o mere babula Meriya
Hun gudiyan
Kol tere reh jaaniyan haaye

Kuch bhi nahi hai tere
Kadmon se aage (2)
Tujhse jo baandhe maine
Tootenge na dhaage (2)

Haath mera thaama tune
Teri Meherbaaniyan
Mere naam ab se teri
Saari Pareshaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye




#Madhanya #RahulVaidya #DishaParmar

snippet.title: काठमाडौमै फिल्मि सैलिमा यसरी ठगिए पुरै गाउले|फरार भएको थाहा पाउँदा रोएरै बेहोस|हेर्नुस ganga lama|
snippet.description:
Host:Ganga lama
Edit/Camera: Man Ghising
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ साथै विभिन्न कलाकारहरु संगको रोचक सम्बाद हेर्नको लागि कृपया हाम्रो च्यानल GOOD TV लाइ SUBSCRIBE गर्न नभुल्नु होला धन्यबाद !!!
Note- के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर 9849148126 मा सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौl  
यस च्यानलमा रहेका Video हरु कपि, Download गरी अन्य Channel मा upload गरेको पाएमा प्रचलित कानुन बमोजिम कडा भन्दा कडा कारबाही गरिनेछ ।
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ। 
#भिडियो_अन्तिम_सम्म_हेरि_सेयर_गर्नुहोला ।

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/galat/RF4DWgxfVF8

Main Samjh Geyi han
Zindagi Cho Mainu Dhakka dena Chahunde Ne

Mere Nal Nal Eh Khali Khali
Falak Roo Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Main Waqt Kina Barbad Kara
Jad Bewafa Nu Yaad Kara
Main Paagal Ajj vi Har Kam Nu
Tera Naam Len Baad Kara

Teri Vich Khud Nu Kho Rahi
Main Ajj v Dardi Loka Ton
Barish Vich Roo Rahi

Dhokha Mere Nal Haye
Ab Talak Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Kabhi Kabhi Tere Dard Mein Haye Sharaab Bhi Piti Hoon
Maine Suna Main Tere Chehre Se Dikhayi Deti Hoon

Mera Jeena Mera Jeena Zeher Ho Gya Hai
Mera Dil Mujhse Rooth Gya Haye Gair Ho Gya Hai

Pal Pal Mereya Saaha Da
Haye Katal Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

snippet.title: Delhi Police से बदतमीजी करने वाले पति-पत्नी गिरफ्तार, थाने पहुंचते ही बदले सुर | Viral Video
snippet.description:
नई दिल्ली. दिल्ली के दरियागंज दिल्ली गेट पर जिस कपल ने पुलिस पिकेट पर पुलिस (Police) के साथ बदतमीजी की थी, उसमें पति पंकज दत्ता और पत्नी को गिरफ्तार किया गया है. पुलिस ने दोनों पर सेक्शन और जोड़ दिए हैं. आरोपियों के खिलाफ IPC की धारा 188, 34, 51B, DDMA, 353 और 186 तहत केस दर्ज किया है.

जांच में पता चला है कि पति पंकज दत्ता के साथ उसकी पत्नी आभा गुप्ता, पटेल नगर अपने घर से घूमने के लिए निकले थे. पति पंकज दत्ता प्राइवेट कंपनी में सेल्स की नौकरी करता है और पत्नी UPSC की तैयारी कर रही है.

दिल्ली के दरियागंज इलाके में रविवार को एक व्यक्ति और उसकी पत्नी को मास्क नहीं पहनने पर पुलिस ने रोका था, जिस पर पुलिसकर्मियों के साथ एक कपल ने बदतमीजी की थी, जिसके बाद व्यक्ति को गिरफ्तार कर लिया गया. सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल हुए वीडियो में पति-पत्नी को पुलिसकर्मियों से साथ बदतमीजी करते हुए देखा जा सकता है.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || मेरी बास्सै || Ep.-698 || April-13-2021|| फेसन शो बिशेष || By Media Hub
snippet.description:
Ghar Jwai has come up with an interesting idea for a fashion show contest. Watch your favorite stars in a new look today and find out who wins by watching the episode!

Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: Is Qadar (Official Video) Tulsi Kumar, Darshan Raval | Sachet-Parampara | Sayeed Quadri | Arvindr K
snippet.description:
Presenting Tulsi Kumar and Darshan Raval’s new romantic song “Is Qadar”. The music of this latest song is directed by Sachet-Parampara, lyrics penned by Sayeed Quadri. The video is directed by Arvindr Khaira.
